Joint Entrance Test Agriculture.verdict_note: All five sampled values (UR 28.44, ST-F 87.11, EWS 41.11 for 2025; SC 32.949, EWS 60.026 for 2022) appear verbatim on the CollegeDekho page as JET cutoff marks for Jaipur National University Agriculture; correctly placed in the Score column.

Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technolo.verdict_note: GetMyUni KIITEE page confirms all sampled closing ranks (BBA 1800, BCA 1050, B.Com 295, B.Sc-CS 1800 for 2020; B.Sc-CS 1561 for 2019); values are ranks correctly placed in the Closing Rank column.

Kerala Nursing Entrance Examination.verdict_note: Source is the official LBS Centre lastrank.pdf; fetcher could not parse the binary/encoded PDF so exact values weren't re-confirmed, but the score values (300, 289.17, 291.66, etc. out of 300) are internally consistent as last-rank marks correctly in the Score column. Minor parsing artifact: some College Name cells captured a category-description header (e.g. 'Socially and Educationally Backward classes...').

Kerala Paramedical Entrance Examination.verdict_note: Same official LBS Centre lastrank.pdf source; PDF returned as unparseable binary so values weren't fetch-confirmed, but the paramedical marks (290.83, 285.84, 265, 280.83, 300 out of 300) are internally consistent last-rank scores correctly placed in the Score column.

Maharashtra Bachelor of Science Nursing.verdict_note: CollegeDekho MH B.Sc Nursing CAP Round-2 2024 page confirms all sampled Open-category closing ranks (9115=57, 9366=229, 9315=1204, 9197=2612, 9370=10131); ranks correctly placed in Closing Rank column.

Maharashtra Polytechnic Entrance Examina.verdict_note: CollegeDekho DTE Maharashtra Polytechnic ECE page confirms Khamgaon NGOPENH rank 6056/91.40 and Latur NLSEBCS rank 6616/91.20; both rank and percentile columns populated correctly.
